meta.title: Minimal example trace
meta.description: The smallest useful trace: one user request, one tool round-trip that changes the artifact, one summary. Copy this file to write your own scenario.

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Replace a piece of text in a file with new text.

events.summary: You are a coding agent. You can edit files.

events.text: The heading on my page has a typo — can you fix it?
The heading says "Helo world" — it's missing an l. One edit fixes it.
Fixed — the heading said "Helo" and now says "Hello".
